---
title: "Apple Tier List"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-us">

    <head>
        <title>Apple Tier List</title>
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="../css/styles.css">
    </head>
    <body>

    <div class = "title-text-box">
        <h1 class = "title-text"> My Rating of different apples </h1>
    </div>

    <div class = "into-text-box">
        <p class = "into-text">Hello and welcome to my tier list of different verities of apples. 
        While I may not be that knowledgeable about apples i do have a lot of op  </p>
    </div>

    <div>
        <div class = "tier-list-box" >
            <p class = "tier-s">S:</p> <img src="../images/honey_crsip.jpeg">
        </div>

        <div class = "tier-list-box">
            <p>A:</p>
        </div>

        <div class = "tier-list-box" >
            <p>B:</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    </body>
</html>
```
